case_title: MEDA SMALL PROPERTIES, LLC VS. JOHNNY ORMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ORMAN, JOHNNY
